user.title: Canvas Student Setup
user.description: Integrate your Canvas LMS account into Home Assistant. If you need help generating an access token, [check the documentation here]({documentation_url}).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Canvas Student
reconfigure.description: Your credentials or instance URL may have changed. Please provide the updated information for {documentation_url}.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Canvas instance. Please check the URL and your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid access token. Please ensure your token is active and has the correct permissions.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.reconfigure_successful: The configuration has been updated successfully.
